reason: The parent owns workflow, package scripts, version metadata, and generated release manifests; W07 supplies the tested release primitives and exact integration contract.
required_change: Replace direct publish with the four-job linux-release-proof -> pack-and-compare and macos-menubar-proof -> pack-and-compare -> stage-publish DAG. Use checkout/setup-node v6, Node 24, exact npm 11.15.0 or newer staged-compatible pin, id-token: write, no package-manager cache, main/exact-version guards, npm stage publish only, stage view/download, release-pack-receipt inspect/compare, immutable artifact upload, and no automatic npm stage approve. Add package scripts and runtime manifests for release-pack-receipt, release-macos-menubar-proof, release-file-ownership-check, release-main-push-guard, and release-main-push-receipt. Split runtime build to tsconfig.build.json with declaration/sourceMap disabled while retaining tsconfig.json for dev/typecheck.
tests_requiring_change: installed tarball smoke from the exact final pack
